CETAPHIL BABY MOISTURIZING BATH & WASH 400ML -Provide 5 areas of protection – gentle, soft, hypoallergenic, moisturising, soothing. •Gentle enough for newborns and babies with delicate skin •Enriched with 1/3 of baby lotion to care for even the most delicate skin •Contains glycerine, panthenol, the building blocks for strengthening the skin barrier DIRECTIONS OF USE BATH & WASH •For bath pour directly into running water. •For baby wash, pour directly onto wash cloth and apply to body. BABY DAILY LOTION 400ML

-Suitable for nourishing baby's delicate skin, perfect to use after bath time.

BABY DAILY LOTION WITH ORGANIC CALENDULA AND SUNFLOWER SEED OIL 400ML

-Formulated with organic calendula to soothe plus sweet almond oil, sunflower oil, and Vitamin E to soften and smooth skin.

-Dermatologist tested and clinically proven to be gentle on sensitive skin.

-Skin type: For baby's delicate skin

- Specially designed to moisturize and protect baby’s sensitive skin from dryness.

- Moisturizes baby’s delicate skin for 24 hours

DIRECTION OF USE LOTION # Pour baby lotion into your hand. Rub both hands together to warm lotion. Gently apply to baby's face and body. If it gets into your baby's eyes, rinse with water.

CETAPHIL BABY GENTLE WASH AND SHAMPOO WITH SHEA BUTTER 400ML

-Enriched with glycerin and panthenol to help nourish without drying or damaging your baby's delicate skin

-Tear-free, hypoallergenic formula rinses clean, leaving a soft fragrance.

-Gentle enough for newborn's and baby's skin.

-0% Paraben, Mineral oils, animal origin ingredients.

-Suitable For: Hair and body

•For newborn & infant skin

CETAPHIL BABY WASH & SHAMPOO WITH ORGANIC CALENDULA AND SUNFLOWER SEED OIL 400ML

-Tear free 2-in-1 formula blends into a rich lather

-Formulated with organic calendula extract, derived from the marigold flower, to help soothe, moisturize and soften sensitive skin while leaving a fresh scent.

-Dermatologist tested and clinically proven to be gentle on sensitive skin.

-Suitable For: Hair and body

DIRECTION OF USE WASH & SHAMPOO # Pour into hand or wash cloth and apply to hair and body. Lather, rinse and towel dry. If it gets into your baby's eyes, rinse with water.

CETAPHIL BABY MOISTURIZING BATH & WASH 400ML

-Provide 5 areas of protection – gentle, soft, hypoallergenic, moisturising, soothing.

•Gentle enough for newborns and babies with delicate skin

•Enriched with 1/3 of baby lotion to care for even the most delicate skin

•Contains glycerine, panthenol, the building blocks for strengthening the skin barrier

DIRECTIONS OF USE BATH & WASH

•For bath pour directly into running water.

•For baby wash, pour directly onto wash cloth and apply to body. If it gets into your baby's eyes, rinse with water.

PRODUCTS WARNINGS

•Always read the label.

•Follow the directions for use. For external use only.

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Baby Daily Care Kit - Consists of 7 care tools in a set: Bath tub thermometer, nail scissor, nail cutter, nail grinder, ear wax removal, finger brush, nose and cavity clip - Safe to sterilize by using UV, steam and high temperature sterilizer - Special design mini scissor for newborn baby with scissor head only 13mm - Nail cutter is designed based on baby’s nail, simple and quick cutting - The ear wax removal is designed with LED light, enhanced design to prevent hurting the baby while using - Nose and cavity clip can be used to remove the dirt in cavity and nose - Use silicone finger brush to clean baby’s cavity easily, maintain the hygiene and cleanliness of the cavity - All the tools are packed and organized in a box, easy to keep and bring along -Color : Green, Pink"}]

Baby Bath Essential Premium Bath Seat

About this item

DURABLE TODDLER BATH SEAT: Made from high-quality, long-lasting materials, this toddler bath seat withstands daily use while keeping your child safe and secure.

COMFORTABLE KIDS BATH TUB SEAT: Ergonomically designed to provide a snug and cozy fit for toddlers and kids 3–36 Months and above, making bath time fun and comfortable.

MULTIFUNCTIONAL SHOWER BENCH & LEARNING CHAIR: Works as a shower bench, bath tub seat, and learning chair, allowing children to sit safely while learning balance and coordination.

ADJUSTABLE & SAFE DESIGN: Adjustable straps ensure the perfect fit for growing toddlers, providing stability and support for safe bath time every day.

PROMOTES INDEPENDENCE & BATHROOM SAFETY: Ideal for kids 3+ years, it encourages independent sitting, confidence, and safe bathing habits while keeping parents worry-free.

标题: OTOCLEAR EAR WAX REMOVAL FOR BABY + **Free 3 Ply Face Mask - 5 Pcs**
详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "Specifications Brand Bionix SKU 319244381_SGAMZ-620520268 Recommended Gender Unisex,Unisex Baby Tub Features Detachable Model OTOClear Recommended User Free Size What’s in the box One Unit of OtoClear Highlights The Bionix OtoClear ® tip was developed by a physician to safely and thoroughly clear the ear canal of wax and debris without exposing the ear to any risk of injury or hearing loss. Safe and comfortable ear irrigation directs water to the ear canal wall with three divergent streams , instead of directly at the Tympanic Membrane. For over a decade, physicians have successfully utilized the Bionix OtoClear ® in their practices to remove even the hardest cases of ear wax from patients as young as 6 months old! Features & Benefits Water is safely dispersed at a 30° angle towards the ear canal walls. Competitive products shoot a stream directly into the ear which can rupture an ear drum upon contact. 3 streams of water generate a whirlpool effect flushing out the wax with 3x the volume and movement than competing single stream products. Impossible to over-insert into the ear canal due to the flare-tip design. Stay clean & dry with exit portals that let the water and debris drain in a controlled manner. Use with water to remove wax or without water simply as an air bellow to safely dry ear canal to prevent infection. Easy to use! **Free 3 Ply Face Mask - 5 Pcs** INDICATIONS FOR USE • Otoclear is used for removing wax build-up from the ear canal for person ages 6 months or older. CONTRAINDICATIONS: • The person has previously had complications following ear irrigation procedures • There is a history of a middle ear infection in the last six weeks • There is discharge from the ear canal or ear pain or tenderness • The person has or suspects an ear drum perforation • The person has had ANY form of ear surgery • The person has cleft palate, repaired or not • The person has tubes • There is a foreign body present in the ear canal • There is a history of inner ear problems (especially vertigo) WARNINGS • Use only warm water to reduce the risk of dizziness or vertigo • If pain or discharge occurs see your physician • Otoclear is intended for single person use only #Otoclear# #ear wax removal# #NuvenMedica# Description **Free 3 Ply Face Mask - 5 Pcs**"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://img.lazcdn.com/g/shop/4dbbd6da4de67b4b76149524fe8d6f68.png_2200x2200q80.png_.webp"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Bionix OtoClear®"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://img.lazcdn.com/g/shop/7a19030f5403ce7bf766e8e61f6f3751.jpeg_2200x2200q80.jpg_.webp"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://img.lazcdn.com/g/shop/84c21e60050f57f0e5603e06aa44774f.jpeg_2200x2200q80.jpg_.webp"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Bionix OtoClear® tip was developed by a physician to safely and thoroughly clear the ear canal of wax and debris without exposing the ear to any risk of injury or hearing loss. "suggestion": "More Baby Personal Care from Bionix", "suggestionUrl": "https://www.lazada.sg/shop-bathing-skin-care/bionix-175089/", "url": "https://www.lazada.sg/bionix-175089/"}, "highlights": "

TheBionixOtoClear®tip was developed by a physician to safely and thoroughly clear the ear canal of wax and debris without exposing the ear to any risk of injury or hearing loss.

Safe and comfortable ear irrigation directs water to the ear canal wall withthree divergent streams, instead of directly at the Tympanic Membrane.

For over a decade, physicians have successfully utilized theBionixOtoClear®in their practices to remove even the hardest cases of ear wax from patients as young as6 months old!

Features & Benefits

  • Water issafely dispersedat a 30° angle towards the ear canal walls. Competitive products shoot a stream directly into the ear which can rupture an ear drum upon contact.
  • 3 streams of watergenerate a whirlpool effect flushing out the wax with 3x the volume and movement than competing single stream products.
  • Impossible to over-insertinto the ear canal due to the flare-tip design.
  • Stayclean & drywith exit portals that let the water and debris drain in a controlled manner.
  • Use with water to remove wax or without water simply as an air bellow to safely dry ear canal to prevent infection.
  • Easy to use!

**Free 3 Ply Face Mask - 5 Pcs**

INDICATIONS FOR USE
•    Otoclear is used for removing wax build-up from the ear canal for person ages 6 months or older.

CONTRAINDICATIONS:
•    The person has previously had complications following ear irrigation procedures
•    There is a history of a middle ear infection in the last six weeks
•    There is discharge from the ear canal or ear pain or tenderness
•    The person has or suspects an ear drum perforation
•    The person has had ANY form of ear surgery
•    The person has cleft palate, repaired or not
•    The person has tubes
•    There is a foreign body present in the ear canal
•    There is a history of inner ear problems (especially vertigo)

WARNINGS
•    Use only warm water to reduce the risk of dizziness or vertigo
•    If pain or discharge occurs see your physician
•    Otoclear is intended for single person use only

详情: [{"type": "text", "text": "⭐️ Bath time is a special time to connect with your baby, so we makes handling your slippery infant safer and easier It makes bath time safe and simple. Designed to be used through growth, this innovative collapsible bathtub support seat offers baby a comfortable place to recline, relax and enjoy - and it offers parents peace of mind knowing that baby is secure. The soft 'jelly' rubber sling cradles your little one comfortably while the perforated soft-touch surface allows the water to keep your little one at the ideal temperature, also allowing excess soap bubbles to be rinsed away easily. This brilliant support can be positioned in any baby or adult-sized bathtub, giving your little one a safe place to relax whilst keeping your hands free to do the important work of keeping your child clean! The support seat is ergonomically designed and has non-slip qualities, and when bathtime is over, you can simply remove from the tub, fold the leg so the seat is compact, and then store away until next time. You can hang it up out of the way – what a space-saving design! ⭐️ Bath time is a special time to connect with your baby, so we makes handling your slippery infant safer and easier

It makes bath time safe and simple. Designed to be used through growth, this innovative collapsible bathtub support seat offers baby a comfortable place to recline, relax and enjoy - and it offers parents peace of mind knowing that baby is secure. The soft 'jelly' rubber sling cradles your little one comfortably while the perforated soft-touch surface allows the water to keep your little one at the ideal temperature, also allowing excess soap bubbles to be rinsed away easily. This brilliant support can be positioned in any baby or adult-sized bathtub, giving your little one a safe place to relax whilst keeping your hands free to do the important work of keeping your child clean! The support seat is ergonomically designed and has non-slip qualities, and when bathtime is over, you can simply remove from the tub, fold the leg so the seat is compact, and then store away until next time. You can hang it up out of the way – what a space-saving design!

  • Design Size 1: 56 x 30 x 25cm (Turquoise)

🎥 Video: https://youtu.be/LTXC25-XrVs

  • Design 2: 56 x 31 x 19cm (Grey Thermometer)

🎥 Video: https://youtu.be/nEVYdCqmCVE

标题: Cubble Peri Bottle for Postpartum Care 360ml/12oz (Teal) Portable Bidet, Perineal Recovery, Feminine Hygiene Care
详情: [{"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/b7430d6cb438d153af57f3e483620b13.jpg"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Cubble Peri Bottle is specifically designed for postpartum perinatal feminine care, baby diaper care, hemorrhoid care and everyday use. Our Peri Bottle provides a more thorough and hygienic cleaning experience without causing discomfort, making it ideal for maintaining skin health and cleanliness in sensitive areas. Key Function: Provides gentle cleansing that soothes irritation when cleaning sensitive areas and diaper changing. Promotes healing and soothing relief from discomfort or itching in the perineal area after childbirth or other pelvic surgeries. Enhances hygiene and comfort after using the toilet, especially during the sensitive postpartum period. Features: Easy to use: Upside-down design and leak proof nozzle with angled spout and protective cap. Flexible EVA Material: Easy to squeeze and control the water flow or spraying direction. 13-Hole Nozzle Spray: Ensures effective and gentle water stream for thorough cleaning. Compact and portable: Convenient for on the go and traveling. Includes a discrete portable travel storage bag. Environmentally Friendly: Reduce the need for excessive toilet paper. Capacity: 360ml/12oz Materials: Bottle: EVA, Nozzle: ABS BPA-free, CE marked and FDA approved"}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/409f49b9b12247d59be08f837282a3e5.jpg"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Tips: Always use warm water for comfort and to promote relaxation. Follow any specific instructions from your healthcare provider or use recommended solutions for best results. Always use the peri bottle gently to prevent discomfort or irritation, especially during the postpartum period. How to Clean Empty the bottle and clean thoroughly with soap and warm water (max 38°C/100°F) after each use. Air dry the peri bottle by placing it upside down on a clean towel or drying rack. Ensure that it is completely dry before storing to prevent mold or bacteria growth. Tips: Always clean the peri bottle after each use to maintain optimal hygiene. Avoid using harsh chemicals or abrasive materials that could damage the bottle or leave behind residues that might irritate sensitive skin. Always check the peri bottle for any signs of wear and tear. Replace it if there are cracks or damage to ensure safe and effective use. Recommeded to replace the nozzle or peri bottle every 3 to 6 months."}, {"type": "image", "url": "https://sg-live-01.slatic.net/p/9534a0336629ddf065cf50c407b3e267.jpg"}, {"type": "text", "text": "Cautions For external use only. Do not insert the nozzle into the vagina and anus. For personal use only. Do not share with others to avoid cross infection. Use by children under 12 years old: only under adult supervision. Do not use this product to carry water when travel. Do not store water in the bottle for a long time. The recommended water temperature for washing/cleaning is 38°C/100°F. Excessive temperature may lead to product deformation or accidental burns and scalds to users. Not suitable for high-temperature (above 70°C/158°F) sterilization methods such as boiling in water, steam sterilization or UV disinfection. Store in a clean, dry place between uses."}]

"suggestion": "More Personal Care from Cubble", "suggestionUrl": "https://www.lazada.sg/personal-care-pleasure/cubble-123896271/", "url": "https://www.lazada.sg/cubble-123896271/"}, "desc": "

Cubble Peri Bottle is specifically designed for postpartum perinatal feminine care, baby diaper care, hemorrhoid care and everyday use. Our Peri Bottle provides a more thorough and hygienic cleaning experience without causing discomfort, making it ideal for maintaining skin health and cleanliness in sensitive areas.

Key Function:

Provides gentle cleansing that soothes irritation when cleaning sensitive areas and diaper changing.

Promotes healing and soothing relief from discomfort or itching in the perineal area after childbirth or other pelvic surgeries.

Enhances hygiene and comfort after using the toilet, especially during the sensitive postpartum period.

Features:

Easy to use: Upside-down design and leak proof nozzle with angled spout and protective cap.

Flexible EVA Material: Easy to squeeze and control the water flow or spraying direction.

13-Hole Nozzle Spray: Ensures effective and gentle water stream for thorough cleaning.

Compact and portable: Convenient for on the go and traveling. Includes a discrete portable travel storage bag.

Environmentally Friendly: Reduce the need for excessive toilet paper.

Capacity: 360ml/12oz

Materials: Bottle: EVA, Nozzle: ABS

BPA-free, CE marked and FDA approved

Tips:

Always use warm water for comfort and to promote relaxation.

Follow any specific instructions from your healthcare provider or use recommended solutions for best results.

Always use the peri bottle gently to prevent discomfort or irritation, especially during the postpartum period.

How to Clean

Empty the bottle and clean thoroughly with soap and warm water (max 38°C/100°F) after each use. Air dry the peri bottle by placing it upside down on a clean towel or drying rack. Ensure that it is completely dry before storing to prevent mold or bacteria growth.

Tips:

Always clean the peri bottle after each use to maintain optimal hygiene.

Avoid using harsh chemicals or abrasive materials that could damage the bottle or leave behind residues that might irritate sensitive skin.

Always check the peri bottle for any signs of wear and tear. Replace it if there are cracks or damage to ensure safe and effective use.

Recommeded to replace the nozzle or peri bottle every 3 to 6 months.

Cautions

For external use only. Do not insert the nozzle into the vagina and anus.

For personal use only. Do not share with others to avoid cross infection.

Use by children under 12 years old: only under adult supervision.

Do not use this product to carry water when travel.

Do not store water in the bottle for a long time.

The recommended water temperature for washing/cleaning is 38°C/100°F. Excessive temperature may lead to product deformation or accidental burns and scalds to users.

Not suitable for high-temperature (above 70°C/158°F) sterilization methods such as boiling in water, steam sterilization or UV disinfection.

Store in a clean, dry place between uses.
